Month_Year: This column represents the specific month and year for which the patch management coverage data is relevant.
Critical_Update_Coverage: This column shows the percentage of critical updates covered by the internal team's patch management for the specified month and year.
Reason_for_Delay: This column gives the reason for any delays or shortcomings in achieving full patch management coverage.
Delays due to after-hours staffing limits
Brief delay due to system update
Brief delay due to network issues
